# AutoGenerated by MkProject.py v1.0
# CMakeLists.txt

cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.30)
set(PROJECT_NAME chip8emu)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 23)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED TRUE)
set(BINARY_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/bin)
set(CMAKE_RUNTIME_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY ${BINARY_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY})
set(CMAKE_LIBRARY_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY ${BINARY_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY})
set(CMAKE_ARCHIVE_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY ${BINARY_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY})
project(${PROJECT_NAME} CXX)
# Set CMake Build Type
set(CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE Debug)
include(FetchContent)
FetchContent_Declare(
    rlimgui
    GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/raylib-extras/rlImGui.git
    GIT_TAG main
)
FetchContent_Declare(
    imgui
    GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/ocornut/imgui.git
    GIT_TAG docking 
)
FetchContent_MakeAvailable(imgui)
FetchContent_MakeAvailable(rlimgui)
add_executable(${PROJECT_NAME}
    ${rlimgui_SOURCE_DIR}/rlImGui.cpp
    ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/misc/cpp/imgui_stdlib.cpp
    src/main.cpp
)
target_include_directories(${PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE 
    include
    ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR} 
    ${rlimgui_SOURCE_DIR}
)
file(GLOB IMGUI_SRC
    ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/*.cpp
)

add_library(imgui STATIC
    ${IMGUI_SRC}
)
target_link_libraries(${PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE raylib spdlog fmt imgui)
